Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Steward (The Elder Empire: Sea)]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Captain is a rank that can be confused between Navigator captains and military captains.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — Calder is a Captain.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — The Steward sends messages through senior Guards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — Steward is a title or role held by Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — The Steward's body was bleeding and he had no pulse.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — The Steward's body is wearing armor that needs to be removed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — The little girl has hair redder than the Captain's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Calder considers reclaiming the Steward's position as a way to pursue his grudge against Shera later.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Jerri refers to Calder as the Captain.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
